betterquesting:10.desc:8:
I finally thought it would be time for me to embrace my mission, to follow into the steps of the one who came before me, to come face to face with the Lord of Gluttony.
And yet, now I am facing obstruction from those who encouraged me.
The faithful of the Arbiter. It was them who, through many of their agents in worlds touched by the Arbiter and the Meatball Man, told me of the history of their god, and slowly revealed one of the most effective weapons used against the Lord of Gluttony.
The Withers. Undeath tamed, and made into a weapon to defeat undeath.
So why is it that, as I initiated the ritual to banish the power of gluttony, the Withers were unleashed against me?
Why are the Testificates opposing me?
Why am I being chased down as if I were some evil cultist performing forbidden rituals?
Have I dug too deep? Have I done anything wrong?
Well, the Testificates now won't even address me. If I have done something that was forbidden, I must find out by myself.
